scope: local U2 preregistration, synthetic fixture, deterministic validators, and adversarial proof machinery only; no empirical U2 population, U2 semantic closure, or UG1 passage is claimed

obligations.claim: V9 claim and U1 implementation boundary are independently hard-anchored and substitution-resistant

evidence.testName: rejects a consistently substituted alternate valid claim
rejects consistent U1 boundary byte and declared-digest substitution
evidence.clause: consistent U1 boundary substitution is rejected

obligations.claim: the finite opportunity generator is exhaustive, injectively identified, and exactly partitioned

evidence.testName: opportunity tuple encoding is injective across hyphen boundaries

obligations.claim: owner, provider, implementation, component, and remote-service identities and versions join exactly with no surplus records
interfaces expose normalized operations and facet provisions are exact supported subsets
meaningfulness and typed exclusions are constructively derived from required interfaces and symmetric conflicts
the synthetic composition corpus derives coverage of all ten preregistered facet families

evidence.clause: all ten facet families are derived

obligations.claim: meaningful opportunities and compositions form an exact bijection with canonical references
authority requirements, states, component advertisements, exclusive ownership, replicas, and arbitration are total and exact

evidence.testName: executes exclusive and replicated authority grammar
evidence.clause: exclusive and replicated authority grammar is executable

obligations.claim: synthetic structural-family aliases count once and the fixture enforces five distinct implementation shapes

evidence.clause: structural aliases do not inflate the family floor

obligations.claim: at least two synthetic compositions have three distinct registered owners and multi-provider status is derived

evidence.testName: rejects three-owner floor collapse with conserved joins
evidence.clause: the three-owner composition floor is independently enforced

obligations.claim: forcing features have exact semantic witnesses and are conserved into compositions

evidence.clause: forcing witnesses must denote supported operations

obligations.claim: composition weights are positive frozen integers with preregistered aggregation semantics

evidence.clause: weights are safe positive integers and aggregate exactly over the meaningful-composition bijection

obligations.claim: exactly one structural family is all-and-only holdout in the synthetic fixture

evidence.clause: the preregistered holdout partition is exact

obligations.claim: assurance classes cannot be promoted without new external evidence
resource bounds are derived from the actual artifact before opportunity materialization

evidence.testName: preflights combinatorial and byte resources before materialization
evidence.clause: resource bounds are checked before materialization

obligations.claim: policy or population changes after results require a new campaign and composition population

evidence.clause: same-campaign retroactive policy mutation is rejected

obligations.claim: future external observations have exact shape and registry joins but are not locally discharged

evidence.testName: validates exact future external observation inputs without discharging them
evidence.clause: external observation shapes and registry joins are validated without discharge

prohibitedClaims: a V9 empirical U2 population is registered
U3 empirical mandatory strata or denominators are frozen

skepticalReview.finding: local validators establish only deterministic contract machinery and a synthetic fixture; identity, independence, advertised truth, custody, timing, registration, and reproduction remain external
skepticalReview.disposition: external validation deferred; no denominator may be reused as empirical

allowed: U3 interface development with explicitly synthetic inputs
U3 fixture development with fixture-local denominators
U3 property tests over synthetic fixtures
forbidden: publication or reuse of empirical U3 denominators
downstreamBoundary.releaseCondition: a verified external U1 source-population.v3 digest and a separately registered and externally reproduced empirical U2 population digest
